titleStmt.title: SII 17.737: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 737. (A.R. No. 680 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: At the entrance to the maṇḍapa in the central shrine of the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

The inscription is dated in the cyclic year Prajāpati which fell in Śaka 1374, The details of date viz., Prajāpati, Makara śu. 10 Friday, Pūśam are irregular, as the combination of the tithi and the star in the month of Makara is impossible. If however, the tithi śu. 10, is taken as a mistake for 15, the given date will regularly correspond to 1452 A.D., January 7, Friday, ·01; ·47.

This inscription records the gift of land as sarvamānya by the members of the mahāsabhā of Kōḻippadāgai alias Kulōttuṅga-śōḻachaturvēdimaṅgalam for various offerings to the goddess Koḍiyiḍai-nāchchiyār on the occasion of Tiruppūrattirunāḷ.
In detailing the boundaries of the gift land the record mentions the bank of the lake called Tiruttānēri; and Veḷḷāṉūr.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍalīśvara rājādhirāja rāja parameśvara
pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścima Uttarasamudrādhipati śrī pira(p) pratāpa mallikāṟ
cuṉadeva mahārāyaṟku cellā niṉṟa piṟacāpati samvaṟcarattu makara nāyaṟ
ṟu pūrvva pakṣattu tecamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa
coḻa maṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattu kāṉappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyal Uṭaiya
mahādevaṟku Akaram koḻippatākai Āṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa caturvetimaṅka
lattu ma hācapaiyom nācciyār koṭiyuṭaiRead koṭiyiṭai.nācciyār tiruppūrattirunāḷ Eṅkaḷ U
paiyam Amutupaṭi kaṟiamutupaṭi veñcaṉam cāttupaṭi pūccuppaṭikkum Eṅkaḷ Ūr kiḻkaḻa
ṉiyil Iṟaiyiḻicci caṟuvamāṉiyam tirunāmattilkāṇi Āka viṭṭa nilam kiḻpāṟkellai tiru
mullaivāyal Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai tiruttānerikaraikku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai ceri
meṭṭu nattam cernta melaittarucu vaṭakku veḷāṉūr Ellaiyuṟak kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai veḷḷāṉūr
Ellaikku teṟkum Innānkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilam cantirātittavaraiyum caṟuvamāṉiyam celva tāka cilā
lekai paṇṇi kuṭuttom koḻippatākai mahāsabhaiyom Ippaṭikku cātavaṉ Uyyak koṇṭāṉ pā
rata cūṭāmaṇi Eḻuttu sabhaiyār paṇiyāl koḻip patākai Uṭaiyān periyamutali Eḻuttu
cerkaṇai vaṭakopuram tirumalai nātaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.737 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
